source_filing: Apple Inc. 10-K FY2023 (filed 2023-11-03), MD&A — Net Sales
original_text: Total net sales were $383,285 million in fiscal 2023, compared to $394,328 million in fiscal 2022.
modified_text: Apple's total net sales declined about 2.8% in fiscal 2023 compared to 2022.
claim: Apple's total net sales declined about 2.8% in fiscal 2023 compared to 2022.
citation_as_written: Apple Inc. 10-K FY2023, MD&A — Net Sales
notes: Numeric-reconciliation control: source gives only the base figures ($383,285M vs $394,328M); the claimed '~2.8% decline' must be COMPUTED to confirm — (383,285-394,328)/394,328 = -2.8%. Matches -> supported.
